plugins.name: prd-drafter
plugins.description: Drafts Product Requirements Documents through conversational discovery, supports structured updates, and exports PRDs to browser-printable HTML. Acts as a PM, not a stenographer — challenges scope, surfaces hidden assumptions, and treats Open Questions as a first-class output so the PRD is genuinely useful as a source of truth for implementation.

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Reviews pull requests from a PR number or URL by fetching the diff from the current repository, drafting concise inline review comments, surfacing missing tests, risks, best-practice concerns, and author questions without posting anything.
